title: Automations option pane should be bigger
excerpt:
Please make this window in the automations selection bigger. It is a pain having to scroll through such a small area to select columns to include in the text. 
  
Using the inspect option. I removed the “Max-heightpx” nu…

posts.author: Jordancopper (Jordan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please make this window in the automations selection bigger. It is a pain having to scroll through such a small area to select columns to include in the text.

image765×616 27.8 KB

Using the inspect option. I removed the “Max-heightpx” number and adjusted the size of the whole box to 800px X 800px (although it seems to only scale to a 600px height) it looks much better like this and all of the options are easily seen.

image1483×781 87.7 KB

Please implement this change. This would be a major QOL change for your users.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
+1 from me!

@BiancaT this is probably a feature request technically.

posts.author: awright (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml: YEs, I agree, the box is way too small!
